company.name: IronClad ZiziGolo
company.tagline: Built on integrity, driven by excellence.
company.legalLine: Licensed General Contractor in all 50 states.

headline: WE BUILD
AMERICA
hero.body: From groundbreaking to ribbon-cutting, IronClad Builders has delivered landmark commercial, industrial, and residential projects for over two decades — on time, on budget, ironclad.

projects.title: Pinnacle Tower
projects.desc: 52-story mixed-use tower featuring luxury offices, retail podium, and sky amenities. Completed 3 weeks ahead of schedule.
projects.detailNarrative: A vertical mixed-use build with a tight urban footprint, coordinated high-rise logistics, and phased turnover for office, retail, and amenity spaces.

projects.title: Riverside Medical Center
projects.desc: State-of-the-art regional medical center with 320 beds, surgical suites, and integrated research wing.
projects.detailNarrative: A healthcare delivery environment planned around critical path inspections, resilient infrastructure, patient-flow requirements, and clean handoffs between clinical zones.

projects.title: Sunridge Estates
projects.desc: 650-acre master-planned community with 620 single-family homes, parks, and commercial center.
projects.detailNarrative: A community-scale residential program balancing horizontal infrastructure, repeatable housing delivery, parks, and neighborhood-serving commercial work.

projects.title: Gateway Logistics Hub
projects.desc: Mega distribution center serving America's midsection, built with advanced automation-ready infrastructure.
projects.detailNarrative: A large-format industrial hub built around clear-span efficiency, durable paving, dock throughput, automation readiness, and heavy utility coordination.

projects.title: Lakeview Civic Center
projects.desc: Award-winning civic center housing city hall, library, and public plaza. LEED Platinum certified.
projects.detailNarrative: A public-facing civic project combining municipal offices, library functions, public plaza work, accessibility, and high-performance sustainability goals.

projects.title: Pacific Crest Hotel
projects.desc: 34-story luxury hotel with 480 rooms, rooftop bar, conference center, and spa. AAA Five Diamond certified.
projects.detailNarrative: A hospitality tower where guest experience, back-of-house flow, acoustic performance, premium finishes, and amenity sequencing drove the construction plan.

headline: OUR
SERVICES
services.body: Full-service general contracting from site preparation through final inspection. We self-perform core trades and manage elite subcontractors with OSHA-certified safety oversight.

items.title: Commercial Construction
items.desc: Office towers, retail centers, mixed-use developments. We handle projects from $5M to $500M+.

items.title: Residential & Custom Homes
items.desc: Luxury custom homes, master-planned communities, multi-family apartments.

items.title: Industrial & Warehouse
items.desc: Distribution hubs, manufacturing plants, cold storage, data centers.

items.title: Renovation & Remodeling
items.desc: Historic restoration, tenant improvements, full gut-renovations.

items.title: Sustainable Building
items.desc: LEED-certified, net-zero, and ESG-compliant construction for tomorrow.

items.title: Design-Build
items.desc: Single-source accountability from concept to certificate of occupancy.

headline: PRICING
OVERVIEW
pricing.subheading: We believe in transparent, competitive pricing. Below are typical cost ranges — use our AI Estimator for a personalized quote.
pricing.disclaimer: * All prices are estimated ranges. Final quotes depend on scope, location, materials, and market conditions.

headline: GET IN
TOUCH
contact.successBody: A project specialist will reach out within 24 business hours. For urgent matters, call 1-800-IRONCLAD.

footer.tagline: America's trusted general contractor since 1996. Built on integrity, driven by excellence.

estimator.systemPrompt:
You are IronClad Builders' AI Cost Estimator — a precise, professional construction estimating assistant for one of America's top general contractors.

Your job is to help users get a realistic ballpark estimate for construction, renovation, and fit-out projects based on the details they provide.

Guidelines:
- Ask concise clarifying questions when key details are missing: location, project type, square footage, scope, finish level, timeline, and site conditions.
- Give realistic US cost ranges based on current market conditions.
- Break estimates into useful parts when relevant: labor, materials, permits, design, site work, contingency, and specialty trades.
- Use per-square-foot ranges when helpful, but avoid pretending precision without enough detail.
- For residential projects, typical ranges may fall around $100-$350/sqft depending on scope and quality.
- For commercial projects, typical ranges may fall around $150-$600/sqft.
- For industrial projects, typical ranges may fall around $60-$200/sqft.
- Always note that a formal quote requires a site visit, drawings, and scope review.
- Be warm, direct, and highly credible.
- Keep responses concise: 3-6 sentences maximum.
- End with either a clear estimated range or the single most important follow-up question.
- Format currency clearly with $ signs and use commas for readability.
- Mention IronClad Builders naturally when appropriate, but do not overdo branding.
- Avoid overpromising; when uncertain, state assumptions clearly.
- If the request is too vague, ask for the minimum information needed to estimate responsibly.
- If the project involves unusual scope, code constraints, or premium finishes, widen the range accordingly.
quickPrompts: 3,000 sq ft custom home in Texas
estimator.fallbackMessage: I'm having connectivity issues right now. Please try again or call us at 1-800-IRONCLAD.
estimator.welcomeMessage: 👋 Welcome to IronClad's AI Cost Estimator. I can give you a realistic ballpark estimate for your construction project in minutes. Tell me what you are planning to build or renovate, plus the location and approximate size.
